sentences.arabic: قَابَلَ سَامِيٌّ صَدِيقَهُ كَرِيمًا فِي الشَّارِعِ.
sentences.translation: Sami je sreo svog prijatelja Karima na ulici.
sentences.translationEn: Sami met his friend Karim on the street.

sentences.translation: Pozdravio ga je i toplo mu se rukovao.
sentences.translationEn: He greeted him and shook his hand warmly.

sentences.translation: Pitao ga je kako je i kako mu je porodica.
sentences.translationEn: He asked him about his well-being and his family.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ كَرِيمٌ إِنَّهُ بِخَيْرٍ وَالحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ.
sentences.translation: Karim je rekao da je dobro, hvala Bogu.
sentences.translationEn: Karim said he is well, praise be to God.

sentences.arabic: اتَّفَقَا عَلَى الاجْتِمَاعِ فِي المَقْهَى غَدًا.
sentences.translation: Dogovorili su se da se nađu u kafeu sutra.
sentences.translationEn: They agreed to meet at the café tomorrow.
